name: MINE : FOREVER
short_description: ⛏️ Mine rocks, alchemize treasures, fill the mushroom codex, and rebirth! 🌟 Infinite growth, endless fun—step into the world of limitless mining and become a legend!
detailed_description:
Game Description: "Infinite Mining: The Stone Saga – Expansion: Curious Mushrooms and Stones of Light"

🪨 "Mine it! Upgrade it! Mine it more!" ⛏️
Now, the joy of mining rocks is just the beginning. Enjoy a rich pro-miner lifestyle with endless features!

🌌 The Ultimate Miner Skill Tree:
Build up your proficiency! Every strike you make fills your proficiency bar.
Use it to enhance your mining speed and power, tearing through the mines at lightning speed! 🌀 (Who even remembers mining manually these days?)

⚗️ Alchemy:
Is just mining rocks starting to feel boring? Become the alchemist of the mines!

  • Transform common rocks into rare, valuable ones with ✨the magic of mining alchemy✨

  • Even useless pebbles? Combine them to create decorative items and impress your friends!

🍄 Mushroom Library!
"Why are mushrooms in a mine?" Don’t question it—this is a fantasy mine.
Collect mushrooms to complete the Library, and what happens next?

  • 🧠 Unlock brand-new abilities!

  • 🦴 Feel oddly healthier and stroger!

🔄 Reborn(rebirth) System: The Secret : Stone of Light
Want to grow endlessly stronger? The Reborn System is the answer!

  • Reset all most things, but keep the Stones of Light and else.

  • Use them for powerful upgrades!

  • Grow faster and stronger, reaching the peak of the mines once more.

"A miner who hasn’t reborn isn’t a true miner" – and yes, we mean it.

💥 Infinite Content, Infinite Mining!
Mine rocks to grow stronger, grow stronger to delve deeper, and when you’re ready… reborn and repeat! Are you ready to become the god of mining?

⛏️ "Mine: FOREVER", start now!
🌟 Today, you’re just a miner, but tomorrow, you’ll be a shining legend.
